entry.title: New IDC 15JPSS20D00000271 awarded to FORFEITURE SUPPORT ASSOCIATES, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:whoCanUse: OTHER:AGENCIES DELEGATED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER
ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Ordering offices must be delegated by the contract Contracting Officer. A copy of all orders and the SOW should be provided to the COR with a copy to the CO.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
